positive: A maximalist, symmetrical cosmic botanical mural. The design features intertwined, stylized celestial flora (nebulae flowers, star-bloom leaves) mixed with delicate, geometric astronomical elements (constellations, orbital paths, moons). The style is a fusion of Neo-Art Nouveau and modern minimalist linework, utilizing a strong limited palette of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, brilliant gold foil texture accents, and rich obsidian black. High contrast is crucial, ensuring clean silhouettes that pop against a solid background. The composition must be highly centralized and balanced, suitable for a repeating or large-format apparel print. Detailed cross-hatching and engraved line work are visible throughout. Intricate, repeating patterns that read cohesively. Vibrant, luminous glow emanating from the core subjects.
